programs.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programs.desc: Six gliders drop from the skies near Cabourg in a surprise attack to take Pegasus Bridge over the One River; securing the bridge is a crucial step in protecting a north flank invasion.

programs.title: Oracles & Prophets
programs.sub_title: Kingdom of Cults, Presidents Death, Sacred Chickens
programs.desc: A prophecy born on a mountainside ignites the ambitions of a controversial figure, an eerie prediction of inclement weather launches a woman into the spotlight, and the fate of empires hangs in the balance as Romans await the pecks of chickens.

programs.title: Fishing for History
programs.sub_title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programs.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programs.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programs.desc: Rob checks out several booths at Game On Expo in Phoenix and finds some unexpected surprises.

programs.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programs.desc: Jordyn and Johnny get a tour from a fellow paranormal investigator, who has a couple tales of her own; it comes to their attention that a former prisoner hung himself in the jail when doing an interview with a former employee.

programs.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programs.desc: Two bodies are discovered near the town of Weerdinger, Netherlands; locals jump to conclusions that the two bodies belong to a man and woman united in life and death.
